meta_title: Man with a Van Hove | Removals Company Brighton

raw_body:
EMAIL US

MAN WITH A VAN HOVE  

Highly efficient, affordable and reliable man and van service. We look after customers and businesses across Hove and Sussex.

How can we help you today?

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage

We are an independent moving company offering a budget man with a van service to customers throughout Brighton and Hove. An affordable solution for smaller moves from flats or small apartments, and also a popular option for businesses moving to new offices. Our team of experts have an in depth knowledge of the local Hove and Sussex area and can move you locally or nationally. Working 7 days a week, with no extra charge for weekend moving, you are dealing with a moving firm who will not let you down.

Our Moving Service

As well as our man and van service, we offer an array of additional services that go hand in hand with ensuring you have a stress free moving experience. If you simply do not have the time to pack, our team can pack and unpack your belongings - safely and securely. Storage rooms are also available, each one being clean, damp free and secure - all at a very attractive price. Overseas removals can also be taken care of, we work closely with agents worldwide and manage your move from start to finish. A range of moving services with each one guaranteed to uphold the same high standards that the company is so well known for.

Our removal vehicles are all high quality with an array of tools and equipment to ensure your furniture is stored safely and securely during transit. From furniture covers to van tie rails and sack trucks to loading ramps and much, much more.

Man with a Van Prices

Now to the most important part for many customers. How much will this service cost you? To keep things simple we break it down into 2 options:

  • ‍Man with a Van and working driver - £70 per hour
  • ‍Man with a Van and driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

All prices are inclusive of vat and fuel (within local area) and there is no additional charges for weekend moving.

Free Man and Van Quote

Simply click on the "Request a Quote" button at the top of this page for a free online quote. Or, if you would like to speak to one of the team give us a call on 01323 848 008. We are a friendly team who strive to deliver first class customer service at every stage.
